title: corydalis temulifolia subsp. aegopodioides
intro: Corydalis temulifolia subsp. aegopodioides, also known as Chinese yellow corydalis or yellow corydalis, is a plant species within the genus Corydalis. This plant is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, particularly for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as dehydrocorybulbine and demethoxyyangonin. The medicinal properties of corydalis temulifolia subsp. aegopodioides are said to provide relief from pain and inflammation, potentially benefiting individuals suffering from arthritis, fibromyalgia, and other chronic pain conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often combined with other medicinal plants, such as ginseng and licorice root, to create teas, tinctures, and capsules that can be used to harness its health benefits.
